images.copyright: Gray seal sleeping on the beach, Orkney Islands, Scotland (© Andrew Mason/Minden Pictures)
images.title: A perfectly timed nap
images.caption: Gray seal sleeping on the beach, Orkney Islands, Scotland
images.desc: National Napping Day couldn't be better timed. It falls on the Monday after Daylight Saving Time begins, when clocks move forward and we all lose an hour of sleep. Consider today an official excuse to slow down and make up for it. The sleeping gray seal in this image, spotted along Scotland's coast, is a fitting reminder for the day: rest matters.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
